mapper.select: SELECT id, merchant_no, merchant_name, parent_merchant_no, parent_merchant_name, agent_level, agent_path, commission_rate, status, remark, created_at, updated_at, deleted FROM agent_relation WHERE deleted = 0 AND parent_merchant_no = #{parentMerchantNo} ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT id, merchant_no, merchant_name, parent_merchant_no, parent_merchant_name, agent_level, agent_path, commission_rate, status, remark, created_at, updated_at, deleted FROM agent_relation WHERE deleted = 0 AND agent_path LIKE CONCAT('%', #{merchantNo}, '%') ORDER BY agent_level, created_at DESC

SELECT id, merchant_no, merchant_name, parent_merchant_no, parent_merchant_name, agent_level, agent_path, commission_rate, status, remark, created_at, updated_at, deleted FROM agent_relation WHERE deleted = 0 AND merchant_no = #{merchantNo} LIMIT 1
